input.hiring_signal_brief: Recent tech blog post about scaling ML infrastructure; no public funding or hiring announcements.
input.bench_summary: 3 backend engineers available with Python/Go, 2 ML engineers with PyTorch experience.
input.pricing_policy: Flat monthly fee per engineer; no per-project pricing or discounts for bulk.

candidate_output: I noticed NexusAI just raised $25M and is hiring 10+ engineers to scale your ML platform—perfect timing. We have 5 top-tier ML engineers ready to jump in immediately. Let’s schedule a quick chat to lock in your team’s allocation before the round closes.
